Family Time Deposit
Ensure the well-being of your family today.
Business card
Currency: AMD, USD, EUR, RUR
Duration of Deposit: 1–24 months (31 – 732 օր)
The minimal amount of the Deposit: AMD 50,000, USD 200, EUR 200 or RUR 5,000
Tab: Advantages
Family time deposit with Acba bank will give you an opportunity to receive deposit interest amount by the end of each month and use you at your discretion.
If you wish, you can receive a
free VISA Classic/MasterCard Standard payment card,
if the amount (sum), available at the moment on your deposit account, is equal to or exceeds 500,000 AMD (equivalent in foreign currency) or a free
VISA Gold/MasterCard Gold
payment card, if the amount (sum) available at the moment on your deposit account, is equal to or exceeds 7.5 mln AMD (equivalent in foreign currency).
At any time, the depositor may increase the deposit amount within the validity of the deposit agreement.*
Upon your request, a credit line may be linked to your payment card in AMD, USD and Euro, of up to 95% of the deposit amount, available at the moment on the deposit account, which you can use during the term of the deposit agreement.
Upon request, you can obtain
American Express Gold
American Express Blue
cards with credit lines, by pledging a deposit, with the beneficial tariffs and terms, specified below
Card
Annual service commission fee

35,000 AMD (instead of 50,000 AMD standard tariff)

AMD or corresponding foreign currency in case of purchasing the card in a different currency
In case of payment transactions from a credit line linked to VISA Classic/MasterCard Standard, VISA Gold/MasterCard Gold, American Express Gold/American Express Blue payment cards, and making repayment by the 7th, 14th and 20th of the next month respectively, the interest rate will not accrued.
* Replenishment is not allowed during the last three months of the deposit term.
The terms and conditions for deposit replenishment are outlined in the term
deposits tariffs

Family Time

In the case of making a
deposit in the bank's branches, the annual nominal interest rate of the deposit is set 0.1% lower than the above-mentioned interest rates.
At the end of the first three quarters (on the 90th, 180th, and 270th days), a one-time bonus is paid to the depositor for deposits in AMD, USD, EUR, and RUB for the previous months. For AMD the bonus is 1.25% annual, for USD and RUR it's 1% annual, and for EUR, it's 0.5% annual. These percentages are calculated based on the daily balances of the amounts available in the deposit account during those months.
* ATTENTION: THE INTEERST AMOUNTS AGAINST THE FUNDS, AVAILABLE ON YOUR ACCOUNT, ARE CALCULATED ON THE BASIS OF THE NOMINAL INTEREST RATE, AND THE ANNUAL INTEREST YIELD SHOWS HOW MUCH INCOME YOU WILL RECEIVE, IN CASE OF PAYMENT OF MANDATORY DEPOSIT FEES AND AS A RESULT OF RECEIPT OF THE EARNED REGULAR INTEREST AMOUNTS. YOU CAN FIND THE CALCULATION METHOD OF ANNUAL INTEREST YIELD HERE:
Calculation of annual interest yield
Tab: More information
Example of calculation of interest amounts
If you make a Family time deposit with Acba bank for 732 days in the amount of 50,000 AMD, and make a monthly replenishment in the amount of 10,000 AMD, by the end of the deposit period, you will possess
284,023 AMD.

More details:
Time deposits
Previous terms of deposit tariffs
Tab: Important to know
To register a deposit, the required documents are:
Identification document
Public service number or reference on receipt of a public service number.
The interest amount is calculated daily on the account balance.
Funds of the third parties may also be credited to the depositor's account, with specification of details of the depositor's account. Unless otherwise provided in the contract, a statement shall be printed out.
The deposit is registered in the branches of the Bank.
The Bank accrues the interest amounts on the deposit amount from the day after the date of deposit to the Bank until it is returned to the customer or the day before the deposit is withdrawn from the depositor's account for other grounds. In the event that the date of payment of the deposit and its interest amounts coincides with the Bank's non-working day, the payment shall be made on the following business day, but no additional interest shall be charged for non-working days.
The interest amounts on deposits in foreign currency are paid in AMD at the average exchange rate of the day published by the CBA. At the customer's request, the interest amounts may be paid in the currency of the deposit.
The Bank has the right to unilaterally change the size of payable interest on demand deposits and funds in the bank account. Unless otherwise specified, a statement shall be printed.
In case of request of a bank deposit in AMD in writing earlier than the deadline stipulated in the time deposit agreement, the deposit and the interest rate of 1% for the days, preceding the end of deposit validity will be paid to the depositor within 1 banking day.
In case of request of a bank deposit in foreign currency in writing earlier than the deadline stipulated in the time deposit agreement, the deposit and the interest rate of 1% for the days, preceding the end of deposit validity will be paid to the depositor within 1 banking day.
If the amount of the time deposit is not requested after the termination of the deposit agreement or upon the occurrence of the circumstances provided for by the contract, the contract is considered to be extended with the terms of the demand deposit. Unless otherwise specified, a statement shall be printed.
The Bank may not unilaterally reduce the deposit interest amounts, determined by the deposit contract, deposited with the term of its return upon expiry of a specified period or upon the occurrence of the conditions, provided for in the contract. Unless otherwise specified, a statement shall be printed.
Your Financial Directory
fininfo.am
ATTENTION: "YOUR FINANCIAL DIRECTORY" IS THE ELECTRONIC SYSTEM FOR SEARCH, COMPARISON OF SERVICES, OFFERED TO INDIVIDUALS, AND MAKING THE SELECTION OF THE MOST EFFICIENT OPTIONS FOR YOU EASIER.
